Hello Groww app team, As you are aware, recent regulatory changes have made the TER of a mutual fund a highly volatile quantity. You need to urgently display the base expense ratio (BER) for better context. The TER id the BER plus brokerage costs plus taxes, and a single day of heavy trading by the fund manager caused the TER to misrepresent the actual value. This also masks actual increases in costs to the customer.
